_description: v7.3.6 — Known-deleted symbols and required test contracts. Updated per release.

contracts.note: v7.3.6 #11 — Injection-Gate Multi-Round-Bypass-Schließung. Two regression-guard tests in chatorchestrator.test.js: 'block verdict prevents tools in any loop round' and 'safe verdict lets multi-round tools proceed normally'. Do not delete or rename without rethinking the gate pattern.
